title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Skill Brief: Usage Feedback
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext usage feedback increment in a skill test and release harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.
Version behavior changes and provide migration notes for consumers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Usage Feedback evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-usage-feedback-ga3pks: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Usage Feedback into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-usage-feedback-ga3pks:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the Usage Feedback model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Usage Feedback applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use missed triggers, repeated corrections, and failures to improve the skill.
